sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74321" key="o)culobe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-λοβέω</orth>, <sense id="n74321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have sharp ears, hear sharply,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
